name: Intron Technology Holdings Limited
summary: Intron Technology Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as automotive electronics solutions provider in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and internationally. The company focuses on providing solutions targeting critical automotive electronic components applied in new energy, body control, safety, and powertrain systems. It also provides various engineering services, such as customer consulting, prototype and product development, and product testing and validation. Intron Technology Holdings Limited was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Shatin, Hong Kong.
